meta.phase-name: Acceleration Lane Decision and Phase Closeout

phase-summary.outcome: Locked lane B as default and completed all Phase 50 tasks. Phase 50 is ready to close with follow-on implementation continuing in next phases.

suggestion.gap: No formal requirement enforces periodic build-vs-buy reassessment.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement for lane scorecard review cadence and switch criteria governance.

next.action: Return active focus to Phase 51 storage contract execution and then wire lane-B assumptions into implementation tasks.
